title: eriogonum compositum subsp. leianthum
intro: Eriogonum compositum subsp. leianthum, also known as Cliff Buckwheat, is a perennial wildflower native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Eriogonum compositum subsp. leianthum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. Cliff Buckwheat can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile remedy for various ailments.
